rationale: The cited paper is not an obvious incidental mention: it directly studies finite-sample parameter recovery in scanner-data logit models with heterogeneity (finite mixture vs HB), while the citing paper’s core contribution is recoverability/identification of latent-class logit segmentation and finite-sample accuracy comparisons between household and store data. This thematic and methodological overlap (heterogeneity representation, recovery, simulation-based benchmarking) suggests the citation could be a substantive comparison or methodological foundation, so it should be retained for full judgment.
